# comfyui_model_merge_wan2_1 (Resource)

1.3B model has 30 blocks, 14B model has 40 blocks. Image to video model has the extra img_emb. [advanced/model_merging/model_specific] Source: comfy_extras/nodes_model_merging_model_specific.py:247 (v1_extras).
